nasb.text: Now therefore, O God of Israel, let Your word, I pray, be confirmed which You have spoken to Your servant, my father David.

esv.text: Now therefore, O God of Israel, let your word be confirmed, which you have spoken to your servant David my father.

cnv.text: 以色列的　神啊，現在求你成就你應許你僕人我父大衛的話吧！

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝耶和华啊，求你实现你向你仆人——我父大卫的应许。
